source.title: Infrared absorption in In-doped degenerate Hg1-xCdxTe
source.claim_state: external source reproduction with source-internal parameter consistency audit

specimen.edge_operator: extrapolation of measured absorption edge to 2000 cm^-1

printed_parameter_reproduction.conclusion: The printed equation with the printed P value does not reproduce the printed Table 1 Fermi elevations.

row_implied_parameter_audit.interpretation: The four independently implied values cluster near 8.51e-8 eV cm; this is a source-consistency inference from rounded table values, not a new material constant.

source_reported_edge_consistency.interpretation: The source-calculated filled edge and the operational 2000 cm^-1 extrapolated edge agree within 0-4 meV at the four reported temperatures.

boundaries: The result validates a source-defined carrier-density integral and operational edge comparison, not the complete free-carrier spectrum.
The row-implied momentum matrix does not supersede the printed source parameter or establish a universal HgCdTe value.
The intrinsic gap values are source inputs and are not endorsed as a universal gap law.
The below-gap Haga-Tang branch remains outside this reproduction because its external function definitions are incomplete in the paper.
validation_scope: Dingrong Table 1 carrier-shift and optical-edge consistency only
